text.title: Voice Basics — Pipeline + Latency Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is the latency SLA below 300ms end-to-end?

branch.conclusion: Escalate out of voice-basics. Use OpenAI Realtime API (WebSocket native STT+LLM+TTS). voice-basics chained pipeline cannot meet this SLA.

branch.question: Is the deployment environment guaranteed silent (closed-mic, studio)?

branch.conclusion: Use Silero VAD or WebRTC VAD aggressiveness 2. Forbid energy-based VAD in production.

branch.question: Is the conversation language fixed for the session?

branch.conclusion: Set `language="<iso>"` explicitly in Whisper. Forbid auto-detect.
Pre-classify language from a quick 1s sample via Whisper-mini language-id mode, then lock for the session. Auto-detect per turn is forbidden.

example.p: Input: customer-service voice agent, latency SLA 1500ms, en-only, office environment. → SLA >= 300ms → silent_env false → conclusion r2-vad-recording: WebRTC VAD aggressiveness 2 + language=en in Whisper + tts-1 streaming voice=nova.
